phrase: The computer was born to solve problems that did not exist before.
author: Bill Gates

phrase: The greatest enemy of knowledge is not ignorance, it is the illusion of knowledge.
author: Stephen Hawking

phrase: I do not fear computers. I fear the lack of them.
author: Isaac Asimov

phrase: Always take a chance on better, even if it seems threatening.
author: Ed catmull

phrase: Any woman is just as capable of being a hero.
author: Hayao Miyazaki

phrase: If your business is not on the internet, then your business will be out of business.
author: Bill Gates

phrase: When you innovate, you’ve got to be prepared for people telling you that you are nuts.
author: Larry Ellison

phrase: I would trade all of my technology for an afternoon with Socrates.
author: Steve Jobs

phrase: If you want to change the world, start with yourself.
author: Mahatma Gandhi
